Paste a JSON array below. Imported questions replace the built-in set for this session. correct uses zero-based option indexes (e.g. [0] = option A, [1,3] = B and D). 

[
  {
    "domain": "Resilient Architectures",
    "question": "A company needs ... What should a solutions architect do?",
    "options": ["Option A text", "Option B text", "Option C text", "Option D text"],
    "correct": [1],
    "explanation": "Why B is right and the others are not."
  }
]
